intent: 200-credit corrective Recraft pass for transparency-sensitive NeoWakeUP GUI assets.
shared_prompt_appendix: NeoWakeUP corrective UI asset pass for transparency-sensitive interface elements. Every asset must be isolated on a truly transparent background with no backing plate, no poster field, no scene fill, and no opaque framing. Deliver clean silhouettes and internal detail only.

assets.name: dial_knob_set_transparency_corrective
